sections.heading: Acceptance
sections.body: By accessing VeteransLedger you agree to these Terms of Use. If you do not agree, please do not use the site.

sections.heading: Permitted Use
sections.body: VeteransLedger is provided for educational, historical research, and commemorative purposes. You may browse, read, and share content for non-commercial personal or academic use with appropriate attribution.

sections.heading: Prohibited Use
sections.body: You may not use VeteransLedger to: (1) promote, glorify, or recruit for any extremist, white-supremacist, or neo-Nazi organisation; (2) reproduce content commercially without written permission; (3) circumvent security controls or attempt to access restricted areas; (4) harvest data by automated means without permission; (5) impersonate VeteransLedger or its contributors.

sections.heading: User Accounts
sections.body: Registered accounts are granted by invitation only. Account holders are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of their credentials and for all activity under their account.

sections.heading: Disclaimer of Warranties
sections.body: VeteransLedger is provided 'as is' without warranty of any kind. We do not warrant that the archive is complete, accurate, or uninterrupted.

sections.heading: Limitation of Liability
sections.body: VeteransLedger and its contributors shall not be liable for any direct, indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from your use of this site.

sections.heading: Governing Law
sections.body: These terms are governed by the laws of the United States. Disputes shall be resolved in the applicable federal or state courts.
